'''√m-ch-g''' ('''kamachag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:maderize|maderize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ch-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:maderize|maderize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √m-ch-g
|-
! Lemma
| kamachag
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thimachag || jimachag || shimachag || kimachag
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthumachag || jujumachag || shushumachag || kukumachag
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thumachag || jumachag || shumachag || kumachag
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thumachag || jumachag || shumachag || kumachag
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || themachag || jemachag || shemachag || kemachag
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothomachag || jojomachag || shoshomachag || kokomachag
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thomachag || jomachag || shomachag || komachag
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thomachag || jomachag || shomachag || komachag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || machag || machag || machag || machag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || machag || machag || machag || machag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || machag || machag || machag || machag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || machag || machag || machag || machag
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæmachag || jæmachag || shæmachag || kæmachag
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathamachag || jajamachag || shashamachag || kakamachag
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thamachag || jamachag || shamachag || kamachag
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thamachag || jamachag || shamachag || kamachag
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shamachag
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshamachag
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishamachag
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shamachagnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshamachagnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishamachagnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shamachagshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshamachagnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishamachagshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shamachagro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshamachagnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishamachagro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shamachagmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshamachagnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishamachagmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shamachagsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshamachagnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishamachagsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shamachagng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshamachagnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishamachagng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shamachagya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshamachagnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishamachagya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shamachagyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshamachagnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishamachagyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shamachagnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshamachagnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishamachagnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shamachagnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshamachagnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishamachagnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shamachagnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshamachagnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishamachagnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shamachagshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshamachagnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishamachagshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shamachagshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshamachagnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishamachagshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shamachagshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshamachagnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishamachagshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shamachagronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshamachagnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishamachagronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shamachagroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshamachagnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishamachagroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shamachagromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshamachagnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishamachagromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shamachagmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshamachagnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishamachagmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shamachagmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshamachagnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishamachagmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shamachagmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshamachagnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishamachagmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
